description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named attiny85_binary_size that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. Use two jobs, build and build_no_forced_inline, both based on the build_template_binary_size.yml template. For build, set board to attiny85 with max_size 9500 and max_size_apa102 12000. For build_no_forced_inline, set board to attiny85 with no size limits and extra_args --defines FASTLED_NO_FORCE_INLINE.
